grant_type.description: Denotes the flow you are using. For Resource Owner Password, use password.

client_secret.description: Your application's Client Secret. Required when the Token Endpoint Authentication Method field at your Application Settings is Post or Basic.

audience.description: The unique identifier of the target API you want to access.

username.description: Resource Owner's identifier, such as a username or email address.

scope.description: String value of the different scopes the application is asking for. Multiple scopes are separated with whitespace.

realm.description: String value of the realm the user belongs. Set this if you want to add realm support at this grant. For more information on what realms are refer to Realm Support.
